Aviation & Flight Tracking.name: OpenSky Network API
Aviation & Flight Tracking.description: Live airspace data including flights, aircraft states, and tracks. Free API (rate limited without registration).

Aviation & Flight Tracking.name: Aviation Edge
Aviation & Flight Tracking.description: Live flights, schedules, and aviation data. Offers a generous free tier.

Maritime & Ship Tracking.name: AISHub API
Maritime & Ship Tracking.description: Crowdsourced AIS data sharing platform. If you feed data, you get the global feed for free. (Otherwise requires payment/API key).

Maritime & Ship Tracking.name: VesselFinder
Maritime & Ship Tracking.description: Provides some open limited search capabilities, but full APIs generally require paid keys. AIS data is notoriously closed behind commercial walls.

Weather & Severe Alerts.name: Open-Meteo
Weather & Severe Alerts.description: Completely open-source weather API. No API key required for non-commercial use.

Weather & Severe Alerts.name: US National Weather Service (NWS) API
Weather & Severe Alerts.description: Free, open REST API for US weather alerts, forecasts, and radar.

Weather & Severe Alerts.name: Global Disaster Alert and Coordination System (GDACS)
Weather & Severe Alerts.description: UN & EU joint framework. Open GeoRSS feeds for earthquakes, tsunamis, floods, and cyclones globally.

Incidents & Crime Data.name: Global Incident Map
Incidents & Crime Data.description: Terrorism, hazmat, and global security incident reporting.

Incidents & Crime Data.name: USGS Earthquake Hazards API
Incidents & Crime Data.description: Real-time global earthquake data in GeoJSON format. Completely open.

Incidents & Crime Data.name: SpotCrime
Incidents & Crime Data.description: Public crime data mapping for the US, UK, and parts of Canada. Has open RSS feeds for specific zip codes.

Incidents & Crime Data.name: Police API (UK)
Incidents & Crime Data.description: Official open API for local crime and policing data in England, Wales, and Northern Ireland.
